commands.description: Run the active Node CLI and emit a JSON analytics report.
Run the current Node test suite.
Verify autogenerated docs are current and that required documentation references remain valid.
Auto-generate CHANGELOG.md, bump the semantic version, and create a Git release tag based on conventional commit history.

repoLayout.description: Pipeline coordinator that assembles all analytics tiers.
Read-only recursive file ingestion for supported text files.
Descriptive, diagnostic, predictive, and prescriptive analytics modules.
Node test coverage for core pipeline behavior.
Hand-authored architecture overview for current and planned system design.
Active development tracker and planned stages.
Installation and execution instructions for end-users.
